zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Crewe於1240年出生在英國爾南特維其時，他的父親Thomas de Crewe III30歲，母親Alice de Chester37歲。他和Avice至少有5個兒子和9個女兒。他去世於1291年享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Crewe于1240年出生在英国爾南特維其时，他的父亲Thomas de Crewe III30岁，母亲Alice de Chester37岁。他和Avice至少有5个儿子和9个女儿。他去世于1291年享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Crewe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Crew
meanings: English: habitational name from Crewe in Cheshire or Crew in Cumberland, both named with Old Welsh criu ‘weir’. This denoted a wickerwork fence that was stretched across a river to catch fish.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Crewe was born in 1240, in Nantwich, Cheshire, England, his father, Thomas de Crewe III, was 30 and his mother, Alice de Chester, was 37. He had at least 5 sons and 9 daughters with Avice. He died in 1291, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Crewe est né en 1240, à Nantwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Crewe III, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Alice de Chester, avait 37 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 9 filles avec Avice. Il est décédé en 1291, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Crewe 1240 in Nantwich, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Crewe III 30 und seine Mutter Alice de Chester 37. Er hatte mit Avice mindestens 5 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Er starb 1291 im Alter von 51 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Crewe è nato il nel 1240 nel Nantwich, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas de Crewe III, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Chester, aveva 37 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 9 figlie con Avice. Morì nel 1291, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Creweが1240年にイギリスチェシュアイアナントウィチで生まれた時，父Thomas de Crewe IIIは30歳，母Alice de Chesterは37歳であった。彼はAviceとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と9人の娘をもうけた。彼は1291年に51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Crewe(이)가 1240년 영국 체실르 난트위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Crewe III(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Chester(은)는 37세였다. 그는 Avice(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1291년 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Crewe nasceu em 1240, em Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Crewe III, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Chester, tinha 37 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 9 filhas com Avice. Ele faleceu em 1291, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Crewe родился в 1240 г. в местности нантвич, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas de Crewe III было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Chester, 37. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 9 дочерей от Avice. Он умер в 1291 г. в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Crewe nació en 1240, en Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Crewe III, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Alice de Chester, tenía 37 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 9 hijas con Avice. Murió en 1291, a la edad de 51 años.
